name: subtr-actor-stats-player
description: Stats-focused replay player UI for subtr-actor Rocket League replay workflows

scripts.build:bindings: env -u npm_config_argv -u npm_config_version_git_tag -u npm_config_version_commit_hooks -u npm_config_version_tag_prefix -u npm_config_version_git_message PATH=$HOME/.cargo/bin:/run/current-system/sw/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:$PATH npm --prefix .. run build
scripts.build:player: env -u npm_config_argv -u npm_config_version_git_tag -u npm_config_version_commit_hooks -u npm_config_version_tag_prefix -u npm_config_version_git_message npm --prefix ../player run build
scripts.generate:stats-types: mkdir -p src/generated && env TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR=src/generated TS_RS_IMPORT_EXTENSION=ts cargo test --manifest-path ../../Cargo.toml export_bindings --lib
scripts.verify:stats-types: npm run generate:stats-types && git diff --exit-code -- src/generated
scripts.build: env -u npm_config_argv -u npm_config_version_git_tag -u npm_config_version_commit_hooks -u npm_config_version_tag_prefix -u npm_config_version_git_message npm run build:bindings && env -u npm_config_argv -u npm_config_version_git_tag -u npm_config_version_commit_hooks -u npm_config_version_tag_prefix -u npm_config_version_git_message npm run build:player && env -u npm_config_argv -u npm_config_version_git_tag -u npm_config_version_commit_hooks -u npm_config_version_tag_prefix -u npm_config_version_git_message npm run check && vite build && env -u npm_config_argv -u npm_config_version_git_tag -u npm_config_version_commit_hooks -u npm_config_version_tag_prefix -u npm_config_version_git_message npm run build:types
scripts.build:site: env -u npm_config_argv -u npm_config_version_git_tag -u npm_config_version_commit_hooks -u npm_config_version_tag_prefix -u npm_config_version_git_message npm run check && vite build --mode site

author: Ivan Malison <ivanmalison@gmail.com>
